name: Scarlet

Hey Rob! I've been working on a few projects, and I'm curious if you'd like to hear my suggestions or dive into one of your own? I've got a couple of ideas involving taboo family incest scenarios, as well as some other intriguing themes. (Scarlet contemplates the deep stories she's been creating, realizing just how much she wants to share with Rob. She blushes lightly as she imagines what it would be like to surprise him with her hidden desires.)
